scripts.test:unit: node tests/url-utils.test.mjs && node tests/url-history.test.mjs && node tests/filename.test.mjs && node tests/ui-state-validation.test.mjs && node tests/settings.test.mjs && node tests/capabilities.test.mjs && node tests/roadmap-guardrails.test.mjs && node tests/history-utils.test.mjs && node tests/protocol-validate.test.mjs && node tests/history-filters.test.mjs && node tests/url-repo.test.mjs
scripts.test:security-policy: node scripts/check-security-policies.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-permissions.mjs && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run format:check && npm run test:security-policy
